description.text: A house renovation is more than a visual upgrade. It is a coordinated process of improving the layout, replacing outdated elements and bringing the property up to a higher technical and practical standard. At DS5 Construction Ltd, we deliver full and partial house renovations across London, helping clients transform tired or inefficient properties into well-planned homes suited to modern living.

Many renovation projects involve opening up enclosed rooms, upgrading ageing services, improving the flow between spaces and raising the overall standard of finish. Our role is to manage these works as one coordinated build, ensuring that the structure, services and finishes are properly integrated throughout the project.

description.title: Renovation Options
description.text:
• Indoor Renovations
    Focused on internal upgrades such as kitchen refurbishment and bathroom renovation, improving day-to-day use, layout and finish quality.
  • Loft and Basement Conversions
    A practical way to unlock underused space within the existing building and increase the property's functionality and value.
  • House Expansions
    Suitable where additional living space is needed to support changing household requirements.
  • Property Refurbishment
    A broader upgrade focused on improving the property's overall condition, appearance, and usability.
  • Flooring and Roofing Works
    Includes flooring installation, roofing and guttering works to improve durability, weather protection and the overall standard of finish.
  • Essential Installations
    Covers plumbing, heating and core service upgrades that are essential for comfort, safety and reliable long-term performance.

description.title: What the service includes
description.text: Our house renovation works typically include strip-out, internal demolition, structural alterations, wall reconfiguration, first- and second-fix electrics, plumbing, heating, plastering, flooring, decorating, kitchens, bathrooms, and bespoke joinery. Where required, works are carried out in line with current Building Regulations and project-specific technical requirements.

description.title: How we deliver it
description.text: Every renovation begins with an assessment of how the property currently functions and how it needs to perform once completed. We then sequence demolition, structural works, service installations and final finishes in the correct order, so that each stage supports the next and the overall build remains organised, efficient and properly controlled.

description.title: The result
description.text: The finished home is better organised, better performing and better suited to modern living, with improved comfort, a stronger layout and a cleaner overall finish.

A well-designed house extension should feel fully integrated with the existing property rather than added on as a separate structure. At DS5 Construction Ltd, we build extensions that increase usable space, improve natural light, and enhance how the home functions day to day.

Whether the project is focused on creating a larger kitchen, a more open-plan ground floor or additional accommodation across two levels, every extension must combine structural integrity, visual balance and a finish that works with the existing property.

description.title: Extension Options
description.text:
• Rear Extension
    A practical solution for extending living space towards the garden while improving the overall usability of the house.
  • Side Return Extension
    Particularly suited to Victorian and Edwardian terraced properties, using side space to create a wider and more functional internal layout.
  • Wrap-Around Extension
    Combines rear and side extension space to create a larger open-plan arrangement with improved flow and more natural light.
  • Double-Storey Extension
    A strong option where additional space is required across two floors without sacrificing too much external area.

description.title: What the service includes
description.text: Our extension works typically include demolition, enabling works, excavation, foundations, drainage, brickwork, blockwork, steelwork, roof construction, insulation, glazing, first- and second-fix services, plastering, flooring, decoration, and final fit-out.

description.title: How we deliver it
description.text: We deliver each extension as a complete build package, including sequencing, structure, roofing, glazing, services, and internal finishes, in the right order. This helps maintain quality, avoid clashes between trades and ensure the new space connects properly with the existing property.

description.title: The result
description.text: The completed extension provides more usable space, improved natural light and a better overall layout, while feeling like a natural continuation of the house.

A summer house or garden room should be built as a properly insulated structure rather than treated as a simple seasonal outbuilding. At DS5 Construction Ltd, we design and build bespoke garden buildings for use as home offices, leisure spaces, guest accommodation, or as flexible home extensions.

These buildings are often expected to perform year-round, which makes the quality of construction especially important. The structure, insulation, roof build-up, doors, glazing and internal finishes all need to work together to create a space that feels comfortable, secure and fully usable.

description.title: What the service includes
description.text: We typically handle groundwork preparation, concrete base installation, structural framing, roof construction, waterproofing, insulation, cladding, window and door fitting, electrical installation, heating provision, plastering, flooring, joinery, and decoration for summer houses and garden rooms.

description.title: How we deliver it
description.text: We approach each garden building as a complete construction project rather than a prefabricated add-on, providing a bespoke solution tailored to each client. The design is developed around the intended use of the space, the site conditions, and the level of finish required to match the main property.

description.title: The result
description.text: The finished structure provides practical additional space that is well-built, visually consistent with the property, and suitable for reliable long-term use.

A new build project requires disciplined coordination from initial planning through to final handover. At DS5 Construction Ltd, we deliver new build projects across London, ensuring that the structure, building envelope, services and finishes are aligned from the outset and delivered in line with your brief, programme and quality expectations.

A new build gives you the opportunity to create a property designed around your exact requirements, whether the priority is layout, performance, long-term durability, or overall finish. To achieve that successfully, every stage of the construction process must be managed with close attention to sequencing, accuracy and workmanship.

description.title: What the service includes
description.text: Our new build works typically include site preparation, enabling works, foundations, drainage, structural frame construction, masonry, roofing, insulation, windows, doors, first- and second-fix services, internal partitions, plastering, joinery, flooring, decorating, and final handover.

description.title: How we deliver it
description.text: We manage each project as a coordinated construction programme, working closely with drawings, consultants and trade packages to maintain consistency at every stage. This allows us to deliver structural integrity, reliable detailing, and a high standard of finish throughout the build, while keeping the project clear, organised, and properly controlled from start to finish.

description.title: The result
description.text: The completed building is robust, well-built, and prepared for long-term use, with all major construction and finishing elements delivered as a single, coherent project. The result is a property that is ready to perform in practice and built to reflect the quality and requirements of your original brief.

A kitchen refurbishment should balance appearance, functionality and technical coordination. At DS5 Construction Ltd, we deliver kitchen refurbishment and installation services tailored to how the space will be used, ensuring that layout, cabinetry, services, and finishes work together effectively.

Whether the project forms part of a larger renovation or is carried out as a standalone upgrade, the quality of the kitchen depends on the preparation behind the visible finish. Service locations, floor levels, joinery alignment and lighting all need to be resolved correctly before final installation.

description.title: What the service includes
description.text: Our kitchen works typically include removal of the existing kitchen, wall and floor preparation, electrical and plumbing alterations, cabinetry installation, worktops, splashbacks, appliance fitting, extractor coordination, tiling, lighting, flooring and final decorating.

description.title: How we deliver it
description.text: We approach the kitchen as a complete fit-out rather than a simple cabinet installation. This means resolving service positions, properly preparing substrates, carefully planning lighting, and ensuring the finished kitchen works both visually and practically.

description.title: The result
description.text: The completed kitchen is practical, durable and well finished, while also improving the overall quality and value of the property.

A bathroom renovation needs to be technically sound before it can be visually successful. At DS5 Construction Ltd, we deliver bathroom renovation and installation services with a strong focus on waterproofing, layout efficiency, drainage, ventilation and finish quality.

While the visible finish is important, the long-term performance of a bathroom depends on what sits behind the surfaces. Service routes, tanking, substrate preparation and the accurate installation of sanitaryware and fittings all play a critical role in ensuring the space performs reliably over time.

description.title: Bathroom Options
description.text:
• Bathroom Renovation
    Best suited to upgrading an existing bathroom within its current footprint. This option is ideal for improving the layout, replacing outdated finishes and fittings, and creating a more practical, well-finished space.
  • New Bathroom Installation
    Suitable where a completely new bathroom is being created as part of a renovation, extension or reconfiguration project. This typically involves a broader scope of works, including new drainage routes, plumbing, electrical provision and full internal fit-out.

description.title: What the service includes
description.text: Our bathroom works typically include site assessment, strip-out, first-fix plumbing and electrics, waterproofing, floor and wall preparation, tiling, sanitaryware installation, cabinetry, mirrors, lighting, decoration, sealing, and final snagging.

description.title: How we deliver it
description.text: We sequence bathroom works carefully so that drainage, pipework, electrical provision, ventilation and waterproofing are completed properly before final finishes are installed. This helps avoid the quality issues that often arise when bathrooms are rushed or poorly coordinated, and ensures the finished room is both technically sound and visually consistent.

description.title: The result
description.text: The completed bathroom is well planned, properly detailed and designed for reliable everyday use, with a clean finish and the durability expected from a professionally delivered installation.

Windows affect how a property looks, feels, and stays warm or cool. At DS5 Construction Ltd, we install windows chosen for their appearance, strength, energy efficiency, and how well they fit your building.

We work with uPVC, aluminium, and rooflight windows, offering solutions for both traditional and modern properties across London. Good fitting is just as important as the window itself. Careful measuring, putting the window in the right place, sealing well, and leaving a neat finish all help the windows work well over time.

description.title: Window Options
description.text:
• uPVC Windows
    These windows are a practical and budget-friendly choice. They offer excellent warmth, easy care, and come in many styles - including sash, casement and tilt-and-turn - to match your taste and needs.
  • Aluminium Windows
    Aluminium windows are best for modern homes and large glass areas. They have slim frames, are strong, and look stylish. You can choose from different types such as casement, tilt-and-turn, bay, or fixed windows.
  • Rooflights
    Used to bring in more daylight from above, roof windows are especially useful for making rooms brighter and providing better overall light.

description.title: What the service includes
description.text: Our window installation service typically includes the removal of existing windows, preparation of openings, installation of new frames and glazing, perimeter insulation, sealing, trims, making good, and final internal and external finishing.

description.title: How we deliver it
description.text: We ensure openings are properly checked, tolerances are controlled, and junctions are sealed correctly so that the finished installation performs well in terms of heat retention, weather protection, and overall finish.

description.title: The result
description.text: The completed installation brings greater comfort, adds welcoming curb appeal, and helps create a lasting, energy-efficient envelope for the property.

Doors are an important part of a property’s performance, security and overall finish. Internally, they provide privacy, acoustic separation, and a consistent finish. Externally, they affect thermal efficiency, weather resistance, access and first impressions.

At DS5 Construction Ltd, we install internal and external doors for residential and commercial projects across London. Our service includes standard door sets, glazed doors, sliding systems, bifold doors, fire doors and bespoke doors. Every installation is carried out with close attention to alignment, ironmongery, frame integration and smooth day-to-day operation.

description.title: Door Options
description.text:
• Aluminium Doors
    are ideal for summer houses and extensions. They offer slim sightlines, strong structural performance, a refined appearance and excellent durability. Their strength and clean detailing make them particularly well suited to sliding and bifold systems with larger glazed panels.
  • uPVC Doors
    uPVC doors are a practical and cost-effective choice for front, rear, patio and French door applications. They offer good thermal efficiency, low maintenance and reliable everyday performance. Available in a range of solid and glazed designs, they suit a wide variety of residential properties.

description.title: What the service includes
description.text: Our door installation service includes removal of existing frames, installation of new linings or frames, door hanging and adjustment, and fitting of handles, locks, hinges and closers. We also carry out threshold detailing and fire door installation where required. On larger projects, door installations are coordinated with flooring, wall finishes, glazing and access requirements.

description.title: How we deliver it
description.text: Even a high-quality door will underperform if it is poorly installed. Correct clearances, proper hinge setting and accurate frame alignment are essential. Fire doors, glazed doors and external systems require additional care to ensure compliance, effective sealing and reliable long-term performance. We treat doors as precision elements, not simply finishing items.

description.title: The result
description.text: A properly fitted door should operate smoothly, close cleanly and sit consistently within the surrounding finishes, contributing to the overall quality, comfort and appearance of the property.
